name: C++
description: A full C++ course, basics through modern standards, in order.
primer:
## C++
An ordered course in the language, easy to advanced.
- **Basics** — types, control flow, functions, the build model.
- **Memory & resources** — pointers, references, RAII, ownership.
- **OOP** — classes, inheritance, polymorphism, the rule of 0/3/5.
- **Templates & STL** — generics, containers, algorithms, iterators.
- **Modern standards & novelties** — what each C++ version (11/14/17/20/23) added.

The through-line: each topic assumes the previous — clear the basics before memory, memory before templates.
